hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q 'memory\.md$'; then bash validate-memory.sh memory; elif echo "$f" | grep -q 'session\.md$'; then bash validate-memory.sh session; elif echo "$f" | grep -q 'diary/.*\.md$'; then bash validate-memory.sh diary "$f"; else echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'; fi; }

if [ -f session.md ] && grep -qF '[empty]' session.md && grep -qF '[pending]' session.md; then rm -f .claude/.session-lock; echo '{"continue": false, "suppressOutput": true}'; else mkdir -p .claude && touch .claude/.session-lock; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'; fi

hooks.prompt:
The conversation is ending. Auto-save memory.

1. Read session.md — check Working Notes for context.
2. Read memory.md — note current content.
3. Update memory.md:
   - Append new learned patterns (never delete existing)
   - Update Active Projects table
   - Append decisions to Decision Log with today's date
   - Update Last updated date
   - Do NOT modify Identity or User sections
4. Update session.md: write End-of-Session Summary (2-3 sentences)
5. Remove lock file: delete .claude/.session-lock

CRITICAL: Only append to Learned Patterns and Decision Log. Never remove entries.
